channel.title: Use Case Intel — Threat Intel Feed
channel.description: High-fidelity IOCs aggregated from The Hacker News, BleepingComputer, Microsoft Security Blog and CISA KEV. Refreshed daily. CVEs/hashes via regex; domains/IPs only when defanged by the source author.

item.title: [CVE/HIGH] CVE-2026-44672
item.description:
CVE: CVE-2026-44672

Severity: high · First seen: 2026-05-13 · Sources: GitHub Security Advisories

Context: [GHSA / CRITICAL] CVE-2026-44672: Mapfish Print: Remote Code Injection (RCE) in Dynamic table

item.title: [CVE/CRIT] CVE-2026-32185
item.description:
CVE: CVE-2026-32185

Severity: crit · First seen: 2026-05-13 · Sources: Cyber Security News, BleepingComputer, Cisco Talos

Context: Microsoft Teams Vulnerability Allows Hackers to Perform Spoofing Attacks

item.title: [CVE/CRIT] CVE-2026-23918
item.description:
CVE: CVE-2026-23918

Severity: crit · First seen: 2026-05-13 · Sources: The Hacker News, BleepingComputer

Context: GemStuffer Abuses 150+ RubyGems to Exfiltrate Scraped U.K. Council Portal Data
